errors.protected_field: Field '{field}' is protected and cannot be updated
errors.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.admin_only_field: Field '{field}' can only be updated by administrators
errors.missing_admin_token: Admin user token (SLACK_ADMIN_USER_TOKEN) is not configured
errors.missing_approval_channel: Approval channel ID is not configured
errors.missing_team_id: Failed to retrieve workspace team ID
errors.not_authorized_approver: You are not authorized to approve this request. Only <@{approver}> can approve or deny.
errors.not_authorized_approver_multiple: You are not authorized to approve this request. Only {approvers} can approve or deny.
errors.no_approver_selected: Please select at least one approver
errors.no_approvers_available: No approvers are available to request this change. Please contact an administrator.
errors.approval_required_but_no_approvers: This operation requires approval, but no approvers are currently available. You can only update your own allowed fields.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later

validation.channel_id_format: Channel ID must start with 'C' followed by uppercase alphanumeric characters
validation.user_id_format: User ID must start with 'U' or 'W' followed by uppercase alphanumeric characters
validation.display_name_too_long: Display name must be 80 characters or less
validation.title_too_long: Title must be 100 characters or less

messages.custom_fields_form_description: Select the custom fields you want to update
messages.no_custom_fields: No custom fields are configured in this workspace
messages.approval_request_sent: ✅ Approval request sent. Please wait for the approver's response.
messages.request_approved:
✅ *Approved*

<@{approver}> approved the profile update request from <@{requester}> for <@{target}>.
messages.request_denied:
❌ *Denied*

<@{approver}> denied the profile update request from <@{requester}> for <@{target}>.
messages.custom_fields_update_notification:
🎉 Custom fields have been updated!

*Target:* <@{target}>
*Updated by:* <@{updater}>
*Changes:*
{changes}

*Requester:* <@{requester}>
*Target User:* <@{target}>

Please approve or deny in the approval channel.

form.title: Update Profile
form.target_user_hint: Approval may be required when selecting another user
form.approver_hint: Only admins and owners can be selected
form.no_approvers_warning: ⚠️ No approvers are currently available. You can only update your own allowed fields (display name, phone, pronouns). Updates to other users or admin-only fields require approval.
